source: .specs/agent-scenarios.md → Feature: Tool gate via permission prompt
notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → waiting when a tool triggers a permission prompt. Recipe uses a PreToolUse hook returning permissionDecision=ask to deterministically open the prompt for a Bash invocation; the session remains in waiting until the recording ends (no user resolves the prompt). The PermissionPending flag from HandlePermissionHook fires rule 0 in state_classifier.go (most authoritative). The second-scenario variant (late PostToolUse after ready) is structurally a no-op in the classifier and not exercised here. Final state = waiting.

text: PreToolUse hook returns permissionDecision=ask → PermissionPending=true → rule 0 drives waiting (race-free against JSONL tool_use)
